scripts.dev: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx watch src/index.ts

scripts.rndc:prod-flow: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx src/cli.ts mtm-prod-flow

scripts.rndc:loading-order: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx src/cli.ts loading-order
scripts.rndc:fulfill: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx src/cli.ts fulfill
scripts.rndc:ping: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx src/cli.ts ping
scripts.rndc:resend: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx src/cli.ts resend
scripts.rndc:annul: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx src/cli.ts annul
scripts.rndc:lookup-pair: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx src/cli.ts lookup-pair
scripts.rndc:lookup-pairs: npm run build -w @tms/rndc-core && tsx src/cli.ts lookup-pairs
